description.zh-Hans: 生成像素艺术树木，可配置类型、树干和树冠参数。支持圆形、圆锥形、层叠形、棕榈形和仙人掌形，通过有机噪波扰动呈现自然效果。输出图像和覆盖遮罩。
description.en: Generates pixel-art trees with configurable type, trunk, and canopy parameters. Supports round, conical, layered, palm, and cactus shapes with organic noise perturbation for a natural look. Outputs both the image and a coverage mask.

triggers.zh-Hans: 树木, 树, 森林, 植被, 植物, 自然环境, 棕榈树, 仙人掌
triggers.en: tree, forest, flora, vegetation, plant, palm, cactus

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成像素艺术树木，用于森林场景或自然环境装饰。
exampleUsage.en: Generate pixel-art trees for forest scenes or natural environment decoration.
